class Solution:
    def latestTimeCatchTheBus(self, buses, passengers, capacity):
        n = len(buses)
        m = len(passengers)
        
        # Sort buses and passengers by their indices
        buses.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
        passengers.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
        
        # Find the earliest bus departure time and earliest passenger arrival time
        earliest_bus = buses[0][1]
        earliest_passenger = passengers[0][1]
        
        # Find the latest bus departure time and latest passenger arrival time
        latest_bus = buses[-1][1]
        latest_passenger = passengers[-1][1]
        
        # Find the earliest and latest arrival time for each bus
        earliest_arrival = [None] * n
        latest_arrival = [None] * n
        
        # Iterate through buses and passengers
        for i in range(n):
            earliest_arrival[i] = buses[i][1]
            latest_arrival[i] = passengers[i][1]
        
        # Find the latest departure time for each passenger
        for j in range(m):
            latest_departure = passengers[j][1]
        
        # Find the earliest arrival time for each passenger
        for j in range(m):
            earliest_arrival[j] = passengers[j][1]
